name: eternal-agni-agnihotra
description: EternalAgni Agnihotra timing app with precise sunrise/sunset times

scripts.cap:copy: npm run build && npx cap copy
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.android:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:run: npm run android:sync && npx cap run android
scripts.android:apk: npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:aab: npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease

author: EternalAgni
